workflow_name: Customer Inquiry Thread -> Response + Pipeline Note
user_message: Give me the manager view on this Alpine Ski House escalation email. Manager is asking for an update today.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Brian Yamamoto <brian.yamamoto@alpineskihou.com>
To: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>

Subject: deployment blockers - Action Required

Just checking in on the deployment blockers proposal. Our COO is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

From: Brian Yamamoto <brian.yamamoto@alpineskihou.com>
To: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-22 17:31 EST
Subject: Follow-up: deployment blockers Review

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about deployment blockers. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

signals.detail: Signal detected for Alpine Ski House: there's a dependency on the security team's review that could delay us

handoffs.condition: MSX update warranted from thread content

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF33-Q trap (No skill for 'thread-state assessment' as a primitive -- current routing fragmen); produces complete Thread analysis, draft response, waiting-on-whom assessment, MSX pipeline note proposal (if warrante
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF33-Q failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF33-Q failure mode (No skill for 'thread-state assessment' as a primitive -- current routing fragmen)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct deployment blockers decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF33-Q -- No skill for 'thread-state assessment' as a primitive -- current routing fragmen
